hero.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
hero.author: Albert Schweitzer

aries.general: Today is a day to recharge your batteries, Aries. Reflect on your recent decisions.
aries.love: Romance blooms as you show vulnerability. Open your heart to your partner.
aries.career: Professional challenges can lead to new opportunities; be ready to adapt.

taurus.general: Your determination will be tested today, but stay steadfast, Taurus.
taurus.love: A pleasant surprise from a loved one can brighten your day.
taurus.career: Collaboration at work will yield better results than going solo.

gemini.general: Communication is key today. Make sure you express your thoughts clearly.
gemini.love: Meet new people; a spark could ignite unexpectedly.
gemini.career: Networking can open doors; don’t hesitate to reach out.

cancer.general: Today calls for emotional introspection; take time for yourself.
cancer.love: A meaningful conversation can deepen your connection.
cancer.career: Trust your instincts when making decisions at work.

leo.general: Your charisma shines today, attracting attention wherever you go.
leo.love: Plan a spontaneous outing; it will reignite passion in your relationship.
leo.career: Take the lead on a project; your vision can inspire others.

virgo.general: Focus on details today; your meticulousness can bring about success.
virgo.love: Sometimes it's the little things that matter most in love.
virgo.career: Review your goals and adjust them as necessary to stay on track.

libra.general: Balance is crucial today; seek harmony in all areas of life.
libra.love: A romantic gesture will strengthen your bond with your partner.
libra.career: Consider consulting colleagues before making any decisions.

scorpio.general: Your intensity can be an asset; channel it productively.
scorpio.love: Trust is vital, make sure to express your feelings openly.
scorpio.career: Your passion can lead to innovative solutions today.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits; be open to new experiences today.
sagittarius.love: A shared activity will bring you closer to your partner.
sagittarius.career: Stay optimistic; your adventurous ideas could be appreciated.

capricorn.general: Focus on long-term success; short-term gains may seem tempting.
capricorn.love: Discuss your future together; it’s a good time for plans.
capricorn.career: Hard work pays off, keep pushing toward your goals.

aquarius.general: Ideas flow freely; document them for future reference.
aquarius.love: An intellectual connection could spark attraction with someone new.
aquarius.career: Think outside the box today; innovation may bring solutions.

pisces.general: Your intuition is heightened; trust your gut feelings today.
pisces.love: Creativity in your romantic life can bring joy.
pisces.career: A collaborative environment will benefit you; share your ideas.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen; you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
professional.author: C.S. Lewis

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Every day is a second chance.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Be a voice, not an echo.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Stay positive, work hard, make it happen.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Believe in yourself and you will be unstoppable.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The future is already here—it’s just not very evenly distributed.
tech.author: William Gibson

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The great growling engine of change—technology.
tech.author: Alfred North Whitehead

tech.text: Technology is the campfire around which we tell our stories.
tech.author: Laurie Anderson

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: Life is short, and it's up to you to make it sweet.
fun.author: Sarah Louise Delany

fun.text: The best way to cheer yourself is to try to cheer someone else up.
fun.author: Mark Twain

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
fun.author: Mae West

fun.text: In the end, we only regret the chances we didn't take.
fun.author: Lewis Carroll

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Everything is possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: Faith is not belief. Belief is passive. Faith is active.
faith.author: Edger Cayce

faith.text: It is not what we take up, but what we give up, that makes us rich.
faith.author: Henry Ward Beecher

faith.text: To believe in something, and not to live it, is dishonest.
faith.author: Mahatma Gandhi

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.
wisdom.author: Søren Kierkegaard

wisdom.text: He who knows others is wise; he who knows himself is enlightened.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu
